_source: IHKE3306S02 (處方藥品 detail) — single inpatient admission, NHI response shape
_note: 5-day admission 111/05/18~05/22, NHI bundles every drug used during the stay into one row. func_DATE is admission, cure_E_DATE is discharge. Original shape had 14 drugs — trimmed here to 3 representative entries (PPI, IV fluid, hemostatic) for test brevity. Regression for the case where all 14 drugs were dated to admission day with no record of the actual usage window. No patient identifiers in this NHI response. Sanitized 2026-06-12: dates year-shifted per file, provider/contact identifiers replaced with synthetics — rows are to be treated as fully synthetic.

drugs.act: 氫離子幫浦抑制劑||PROTON-PUMP INHIBITOR
